categories.label: Code Review
categories.description: Automated code review with parallel subagents and multi-model consensus.

categories.label: CI & Monitoring
categories.description: Monitor pull requests, CI pipelines, and build health.

categories.label: Workflow & Triage
categories.description: Slash commands, notification triage, and daily development flows.

categories.label: Code Quality
categories.description: Enforce coding standards and ban patterns via hooks.

categories.label: Testing
categories.description: Visual testing and fixture-based component exploration.

categories.label: Debugging
categories.description: Debug Adapter Protocol tooling for driving debug sessions from the CLI.

plugins.name: handy-commands
plugins.description: Helpful slash commands for common development workflows.

plugins.name: ban-ast
plugins.description: Ban code patterns using Tree Sitter AST queries. Rejects edits that introduce banned patterns unless justified.

plugins.name: component-explorer
plugins.description: Skills for setting up and using the VS Code Component Explorer — fixture-based visual testing with MCP-powered screenshot comparison.

plugins.name: model-council
plugins.description: Multi-model council for code review and planning — model-pinned subagents independently review or plan, then findings are synthesized by consensus.

plugins.name: review-areas
plugins.description: Area-focused code review that fans out to parallel subagents — each examining a different review area (correctness, tests, security, performance, product).

plugins.name: review-plan
plugins.description: Review implementation plans before handing off to coding — fans out parallel subagents across completeness, feasibility, sequencing, scope, and risk.

plugins.name: goal
plugins.description: Give the agent a durable objective with a verifiable stopping condition — like Codex /goal. Sets, tracks, pauses, resumes, or clears a long-running goal across turns.

plugins.name: monitor-pr
plugins.description: Monitor a pull request until CI status and Copilot review are available — non-polling async terminal scripts that notify the agent when CI or reviews complete.

plugins.name: github-inbox
plugins.description: Triage and act on your GitHub notifications — smart grouping, rules, memory, and sub-agents for review, triage, and investigation.

plugins.name: build-health
plugins.description: Analyze VS Code rolling build health on Azure DevOps — download recent builds, identify failures, show break/fix transitions with error details and commit links.

plugins.name: rubber-duck
plugins.description: Constructive devil's advocate that critically reviews proposals, designs, implementations, or tests — categorizes feedback as Blocking, Non-Blocking, or Suggestion.

plugins.name: research
plugins.description: Deep research orchestrator — decomposes queries, fans out parallel subagents for web and code search, iteratively refines findings, then synthesizes citation-rich reports.

plugins.name: dap-cli
plugins.description: Agent skill for driving dap-cli — DAP debugging, breakpoints, stack/variables inspection, launch.json configs, js-debug, debugpy, Playwright interop.
